metadata.description: x-mesh toolkit — structured problem solving, strategy orchestration, and multi-agent primitives for Claude Code

plugins.name: x-build
plugins.description: Phase-based project harness with requirements gathering, parallel research, plan validation, DAG execution, cost forecasting, and decision memory

plugins.name: x-agent
plugins.description: Agent primitives with role presets — fan-out, delegate, broadcast for native multi-agent orchestration

plugins.name: x-op
plugins.description: Strategy orchestration — 18 strategies including refine, tournament, chain, review, debate, red-team, brainstorm, distribute, council, socratic, persona, scaffold, compose, decompose, hypothesis, investigate, monitor, escalate

plugins.name: x-solver
plugins.description: Structured problem solving — decompose, iterate, constrain, or auto-pipeline with strategy recommendation

plugins.name: x-review
plugins.description: Multi-perspective code review orchestrator — PR diff analysis with severity-rated findings and LGTM verdict

plugins.name: x-trace
plugins.description: Agent execution tracing — timeline, token/cost tracking, replay, and diff for multi-agent observability

plugins.name: x-memory
plugins.description: Cross-session decision and pattern memory — persist learnings, auto-inject relevant context on session start

plugins.name: x-eval
plugins.description: Agent output quality evaluation — multi-rubric scoring, strategy benchmarking, and A/B prompt experiments

plugins.name: x-core
plugins.description: All-in-one bundle: x-build + x-op + x-agent + x-solver in a single install
